case_title: SAN FRANCISCO CITY EMPLOYEES CREDIT UNION VS BOWIE COURTNEY H.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOWIE COURTNEY H.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO CITY EMPLOYEES CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOWIE COURTNEY H. $2,692.59 PRINCIPAL, $56.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,749.09, PLFT AGREES TO ACCEPT $20 PER MONNTH FROM DET, FOR SIX MONTHS AT WHICH TIME PLFT & DEFT WILL MEET TO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,799.12 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO CITY EMPLOYEES CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT BOWIE COURTNEY H. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
